notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: 王毅分别会见印尼、莱索托、多米尼克客人
articles.highlight: 中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅18日在上海分别会见来华出席世界人工智能大会的三国政要。
articles.summary: 报道了王毅在上海会见印尼、莱索托、多米尼克三国高级别政要，各方就共同关心的议题交换意见，并出席世界人工智能大会。该新闻展现了中国积极的外交互动和对国际科技合作的重视。

articles.title: 第十七届民盟文化论坛在上海举办
articles.highlight: 第十七届民盟文化论坛16日至17日在上海举办，主题为“赓续文化薪火 激扬时代新声”。
articles.summary: 该论坛由民盟中央主办，旨在弘扬中华优秀传统文化并激发时代创新。民盟中央副主席吴为山等领导出席致辞，体现了民主党派在文化传承中的积极作用。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该报道体现了民盟对文化建设的重视，但论坛产生的具体政策建议或社会影响尚需进一步观察。

en.summary: The forum, organized by the Central Committee of the China Democratic League, aims to promote traditional Chinese culture and inspire contemporary innovation. Key figures like Wu Weishan attended and delivered speeches, highlighting the role of non-communist parties in cultural heritage.

articles.title: Cuba edges toward breakdown as power cuts and US meddling push society to brink
articles.highlight: 古巴国家电网10天内第三次崩溃，民众怨声载道，社会动荡加剧。
articles.summary: 文章描述了古巴因美国长达六个月的石油封锁导致国家电网频繁崩溃，社会不满情绪上升。基础设施老化问题由来已久，局势日益严峻，值得关注国际政治对民生影响。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键问题：美国封锁加剧了古巴基础设施的脆弱性，但根本原因在于长期缺乏维护和投资。
articles.sourceExcerpt: As Cuba swelters under six-month oil blockade imposed by US, tempers are fraying and unrest is growing When Cuba’s national grid collapses, as it did for the third time in 10 days on Tuesday, a collective groan spreads across its cities and people wonder, again, whether the island’s antiquated electricity system may soon become unrecoverable. The 777-mile Caribbean island of 9.5 million people has been sweltering under a six-month-long oil blockade imposed by the US, part of a pressure campaign to bring down its communist government. But the parlous state of Cuba’s infrastructure goes far further back.

zh.title: 古巴在电力短缺和美国干预下濒临崩溃
zh.highlight: 古巴国家电网10天内第三次崩溃，民众怨声载道，社会动荡加剧。

zh.failureAnalysis: 关键问题：美国封锁加剧了古巴基础设施的脆弱性，但根本原因在于长期缺乏维护和投资。

en.highlight: When Cuba’s national grid collapses, as it did for the third time in 10 days on Tuesday, a collective groan spreads across its cities.
en.summary: The article describes how a six-month US oil blockade has caused frequent blackouts in Cuba, fueling unrest. It highlights the deteriorating infrastructure and the broader geopolitical pressure, making it a key read for understanding Cuba's crisis.
en.failureAnalysis: The key takeaway is that US sanctions exacerbate Cuba's infrastructure woes, but the underlying issue is long-term neglect and lack of investment.
en.title: Cuba edges toward breakdown as power cuts and US meddling push society to brink

articles.title: 8 killed and more than 60 wounded in Ukrainian drone attack on Russian regions
articles.highlight: 基辅部队继续对俄罗斯境内的能源基础设施和军事目标进行空中打击，旨在削弱莫斯科的战争努力。
articles.summary: 乌克兰无人机袭击俄罗斯多个地区，造成8人死亡、60多人受伤。袭击针对能源和军事目标，意图削弱俄罗斯的战争能力。这反映了俄乌冲突中无人机攻击的升级态势。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键点：乌克兰持续通过无人机打击俄后方目标以破坏其战争能力，但此类攻击可能引发俄方更强烈报复。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Kyiv's forces are continuing their aerial campaign against energy infrastructure and military targets inside Russia, aiming to undermine Moscow's war effort.

zh.title: 乌克兰无人机袭击俄罗斯地区致8死60余伤
zh.highlight: 基辅部队继续对俄罗斯境内的能源基础设施和军事目标进行空中打击，旨在削弱莫斯科的战争努力。
zh.summary: 乌克兰无人机袭击俄罗斯多个地区，造成8人死亡、60多人受伤。袭击针对能源和军事目标，意图削弱俄罗斯的战争能力。这反映了俄乌冲突中无人机攻击的升级态势。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键点：乌克兰持续通过无人机打击俄后方目标以破坏其战争能力，但此类攻击可能引发俄方更强烈报复。

en.highlight: Kyiv's forces are continuing their aerial campaign against energy infrastructure and military targets inside Russia, aiming to undermine Moscow's war effort.
en.summary: A Ukrainian drone attack on multiple Russian regions killed 8 people and wounded over 60. The strikes targeted energy infrastructure and military sites to weaken Russia's war effort, reflecting an escalation in drone warfare in the conflict.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Ukraine continues to use drone strikes on Russian rear targets to disrupt its war capabilities, but such attacks may provoke stronger retaliation from Russia.
en.title: 8 killed, more than 60 wounded in Ukrainian drone attack on Russian regions

articles.title: cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目描述了一个名为Mercury Agent的AI代理，它具备权限强化工具、代币预算管理，并能通过CLI或Telegram全天候运行。值得关注的是，它展示了如何构建一个持久化、多接口的AI助手，但实际应用中可能存在抽象概念落地难的问题。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目强调“灵魂驱动”等抽象特性，可能缺乏明确的用户价值主张，导致需求不明确。权限强化和代币预算增加了使用复杂度，可能限制用户采纳。24/7运行需要高可靠性和成本投入，但项目来源仅为GitHub仓库，缺乏商业验证和分发渠道，容易沦为小众玩具。
articles.highlight: 灵魂驱动的AI代理，具有权限强化工具、代币预算和多渠道访问能力。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 2951 stars and recent public activity. Description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.

zh.title: Mercury Agent：灵魂驱动的AI代理，带权限强化工具和代币预算
zh.highlight: 灵魂驱动的AI代理，具有权限强化工具、代币预算和多渠道访问能力。
zh.summary: 该项目描述了一个名为Mercury Agent的AI代理，它具备权限强化工具、代币预算管理，并能通过CLI或Telegram全天候运行。值得关注的是，它展示了如何构建一个持久化、多接口的AI助手，但实际应用中可能存在抽象概念落地难的问题。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目强调“灵魂驱动”等抽象特性，可能缺乏明确的用户价值主张，导致需求不明确。权限强化和代币预算增加了使用复杂度，可能限制用户采纳。24/7运行需要高可靠性和成本投入，但项目来源仅为GitHub仓库，缺乏商业验证和分发渠道，容易沦为小众玩具。

en.highlight: A soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access.
en.summary: The project describes Mercury Agent, an AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and 24/7 multi-channel access via CLI or Telegram. It is worth reading because it demonstrates a persistent, multi-interface AI assistant, though its abstract concept may struggle to find practical demand.
en.failureAnalysis: The project's 'soul-driven' abstraction may lack clear user value, while permission-hardened tools and token budgets increase complexity. High reliability and cost for 24/7 operation, with no proven distribution or demand, risk it remaining a niche project.
en.title: Mercury Agent: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools and token budgets

articles.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: Company source + HN discussion
articles.summary: 本文是Anthropic对近期Claude Code质量问题的公开回应，详细分析了问题的根源和修复措施。值得阅读因为它展示了AI产品如何在现实中应对用户反馈和工程挑战。
articles.failureAnalysis: Claude Code作为AI编码助手，面临代码生成准确性和可靠性挑战，用户期望高而容错率低。产品需要大量高质量训练数据和持续改进，工程成本高昂。如果无法快速验证并修复质量问题，可能失去开发者信任，导致用户流失。

en.highlight: We have provided an update on recent Claude Code quality reports.
en.summary: This article is Anthropic's public response to recent quality issues in Claude Code, detailing root causes and fixes. It is worth reading as it shows how an AI product handles real-world feedback and engineering challenges.
en.failureAnalysis: Claude Code faces high expectations for code accuracy and low tolerance for errors. The product demands extensive training data and continuous improvement, with high engineering costs. Failure to quickly validate and fix quality issues could erode developer trust and lead to user churn.

articles.title: OpenNSWM-Lab/FAROS
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: FAROS是一个开源项目，旨在自动化整个AI研究工作流，包括想法生成、实验执行、论文写作和同行评审。它通过蓝图机制协调各个阶段，有望大幅提升研究效率，适合快速迭代和标准化研究流程。值得关注其模块化设计和可扩展性，可能改变科研范式。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目面临的核心挑战是自动化研究能否产出高质量成果，尤其在创意和评审环节，AI可能缺乏深度和创新性。部署上需要大量计算资源和领域知识，商业化路径不清晰。同时，学术界对自动化研究接受度低，监管和伦理问题尚未解决。
articles.highlight: 一个蓝图驱动的AutoResearch运行时，可编排从创意生成到论文撰写的AI研究全流程。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1996 stars and recent public activity. Description: A blueprint-driven AutoResearch runtime for orchestrating AI research workflows from idea generation and experiments to paper writing and peer review.

zh.title: FAROS：蓝图驱动的自动科研运行时
zh.highlight: 一个蓝图驱动的AutoResearch运行时，可编排从创意生成到论文撰写的AI研究全流程。
zh.summary: FAROS是一个开源项目，旨在自动化整个AI研究工作流，包括想法生成、实验执行、论文写作和同行评审。它通过蓝图机制协调各个阶段，有望大幅提升研究效率，适合快速迭代和标准化研究流程。值得关注其模块化设计和可扩展性，可能改变科研范式。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目面临的核心挑战是自动化研究能否产出高质量成果，尤其在创意和评审环节，AI可能缺乏深度和创新性。部署上需要大量计算资源和领域知识，商业化路径不清晰。同时，学术界对自动化研究接受度低，监管和伦理问题尚未解决。

en.highlight: A blueprint-driven AutoResearch runtime orchestrating AI research workflows from idea generation to paper writing and peer review.
en.summary: FAROS is an open-source project automating the full AI research workflow, including idea generation, experiment execution, paper writing, and peer review. It coordinates stages via a blueprint mechanism, aiming to boost research efficiency. Worth reading for its modular design and potential to transform research paradigms.
en.failureAnalysis: Key challenges include ensuring quality of automated research outputs in creative and review stages, high computational and domain expertise requirements, unclear monetization, and low academic acceptance of automated research.
en.title: FAROS: A Blueprint-Driven AutoResearch Runtime

articles.title: aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该仓库提供官方AWS支持的MCP服务器、技能和插件，帮助开发者快速构建和部署AI代理。值得阅读是因为它降低了在AWS生态中集成AI代理的门槛，且获得1953星表明社区关注度高。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能因过度绑定AWS生态而限制用户选择，增加迁移成本。使用AWS服务可能产生持续费用，对小型团队不友好。同时，与已有代理框架（如LangChain）竞争激烈，需持续维护更新。
articles.highlight: 官方AWS支持的MCP服务器、技能和插件，帮助AI代理在AWS上构建。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1953 stars and recent public activity. Description: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS

zh.title: AWS官方AI代理工具包
zh.highlight: 官方AWS支持的MCP服务器、技能和插件，帮助AI代理在AWS上构建。
zh.summary: 该仓库提供官方AWS支持的MCP服务器、技能和插件，帮助开发者快速构建和部署AI代理。值得阅读是因为它降低了在AWS生态中集成AI代理的门槛，且获得1953星表明社区关注度高。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能因过度绑定AWS生态而限制用户选择，增加迁移成本。使用AWS服务可能产生持续费用，对小型团队不友好。同时，与已有代理框架（如LangChain）竞争激烈，需持续维护更新。

en.highlight: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS.
en.summary: This repository provides official AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help developers build and deploy AI agents quickly. It is worth reading because it lowers the barrier to integrating AI agents within the AWS ecosystem, and its 1953 stars indicate strong community interest.
en.failureAnalysis: The project may fail due to vendor lock-in to AWS, limiting user flexibility and increasing migration costs. Ongoing AWS service fees could deter small teams, and stiff competition from existing frameworks like LangChain requires constant innovation.
en.title: AWS Official AI Agent Toolkit
